lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Frontier (Official)
sources.what: Authoritative list of currently-active goals and their full briefs.

sources.label: Inara — CG tracker
sources.what: Live global progress, your personal contribution, and estimated bracket boundaries — the single best companion tool.

sources.label: EDCodex calculator
sources.what: CG reward-threshold calculator — estimates how many more runs a bracket jump costs, by ship size.

sources.label: Frontier CG forum
sources.what: Per-goal discussion threads, predictions, completion confirmations, and reward troubleshooting.

sources.label: EDDN
sources.what: Community data network aggregating the live market and CG-progress feeds.

sources.label: Fandom Wiki
sources.what: CG mechanics, bracket / Top 10% scoring, reward types, and historical reference.
